strengths: Successfully introduced the loop and positioned it around the target appendage
Demonstrated good instrument coordination during loop manipulation
Maintained steady camera view throughout most of the procedure
weaknesses: Failed to complete the task within the time limit
Loop was not properly secured on the middle appendage
Did not successfully cut the tail inside the trainer
Struggled with final loop tightening and positioning

drills.name: Loop opening and parking
drills.description: Practice opening the loop and parking it around the target appendage before tightening, focusing on proper positioning at the marked location.
drills.targets_weakness: Loop was not properly secured on the middle appendage

drills.name: Mark-centering drill
drills.description: Place the loop at the target mark, pause to verify alignment, then practice controlled cinching without losing position.
drills.targets_weakness: Struggled with final loop tightening and positioning

drills.name: Tail-cut finish drill
drills.description: Practice 10 secure loop placements followed by controlled tail cuts without disturbing the loop position.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not successfully cut the tail inside the trainer

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your good positioning skills into complete task execution. Work on the final phases of loop securing and tail cutting to avoid timeout penalties.
